title: Compound Agent System Event Log v1
description: Append-only local JSONL event records for auditability without telemetry or upload.

event.description: Stable action name such as install, agent-activate, task-open, quality-check, readiness-decision, or handoff-checkpoint.

command.description: CLI command or subsystem that produced the event. Must not include secret values.

context.description: Safe diagnostic context only: ids, counts, booleans, relative file names, text lengths, and short hashes.
